name: encoder_trend_only_core
description: Content-agnostic event feature schema that removes screen-relative x/y fixation position and keeps duration plus transition dynamics.
notes: Use this schema to test whether transition dynamics and fixation timing outperform screen-relative fixation position.
No visual stimulus content is used.
Screen-relative x/y fixation coordinates are intentionally excluded.
DVA position features are intentionally excluded for robustness to distance, posture, and hardware metadata differences.
